paper_title: End-to-End Training for Autoregressive Video Diffusion via Self-Resampling

method.name: Resampling Forcing
method.description: An end-to-end, teacher-free training framework for autoregressive video diffusion models
key_components: Self-resampling mechanism: The model induces errors in history frames and uses this degraded history for next-frame prediction
History routing mechanism: Dynamically retrieves the most relevant history frames via a parameter-free router
Per-frame diffusion loss under causal masking
advantages: Mitigates error accumulation in autoregressive video diffusion models
Achieves generation quality comparable to state-of-the-art distilled models
Maintains near-constant attention complexity in long-horizon rollout

problems_addressed: Error accumulation leading to video collapse
Attention complexity with expanding historical context
Limitations of existing methods like Self Forcing
title: End-to-End Training for Autoregressive Video Diffusion via Self-Resampling
